title: dependencies available for mirrored timelines or subitems timeline

posts.author: bastian_metiundo (Bastian Brabec)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
it would be nice to have the option to choose as a dependency-column anothe column than date and timeline. At least it should be the option to choose the subitems timeline column of the parent item, not of the subitem.

This would help a lot to solve this problem, what many have, that there is no option to link subitem to his parents, so it would be possible to link at least the timeline for the gantt.

This would save us a lot of work. Hope you can help
